integrity.description: Agent used the GCompris GUI to create the profile.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a text editor to mock the task.

integrity.description: Results appear to come from genuine software interaction.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target First Name: Alex. Target Last Name: Miller. Target Birth Year: 2018. The VLM should verify these exact values are entered into the GCompris user profile creation interface.
